sections.title: If the player is not disguised

lines.speaker: Caninelle/Pipistrelle Draynar
lines.text: Human! Get back to the slave pens before I call the guards!

lines.speaker: Pipistrelle Draynar
lines.text: I don't know, darling. Why don't you ask them?

lines.speaker: Caninelle Draynar
lines.text: Hello, [Vampyre name]. I'm Caninelle Draynar and this is Pipistrelle Draynar.

lines.speaker: Pipistrelle Draynar
lines.text: Oh yes. The Draynar family has been around since before vampyres came to this world.

lines.speaker: Caninelle Draynar
lines.text: Over time, some people took the name and started pronouncing it differently. Hence Draynor.

lines.speaker: Pipistrelle Draynar
lines.text: Draynor is more commonly used as a first name though, with Draynar as a last name.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the information. I wonder if there's a Draynor Draynar out there.
